body.title: We can't find this page | Sharp HealthCare

meta.name: description
meta.content: Sharp HealthCare is San Diego's health care leader with hospitals in San Diego, affiliated medical groups, urgent care centers and a health plan. Sharp provides medical services in virtually all fields of medicine, including primary care, heart care, cancer treatment, orthopedics and women’s health. Looking for San Diego doctors? Seeking nursing jobs in San Diego? Visit Sharp.com or call 1-800-82-SHARP.

Seeking nursing jobs in San Diego? Visit Sharp.com or call 1-800-82-SHARP.

and Sharp HealthCare partnership\",\"slug\":\"tri-city-and-sharp-healthcare-partnership\",\"summary\":\"As San Diego’s health care leader, we are excited to partner with the Tri-City Healthcare District to ensure North County residents have enhanced access to high quality, exceptional health care.\",\"seoTitle\":\"Tri-City and Sharp HealthCare partnership\",\"seoDescription\":\"Sharp is excited to partner with the Tri-City Healthcare District to ensure North County residents have enhanced access to high quality, exceptional care.\",\"searchIndex\":true,\"blocks\":[{\"metadata\":{\"tags\":[],\"concepts\":[]},\"sys\":{\"space\":{\"sys\":{\"type\":\"Link\",\"linkType\":\"Space\",\"id\":\"pxcfulgsd9e2\"}},\"id\":\"18x9Tv9TS07G5Oe8vbFjn9\",\"type\":\"Entry\",\"createdAt\":\"2025-08-21T23:12:34.025Z\",\"updatedAt\":\"2025-08-21T23:12:34.025Z\",\"environment\":{\"sys\":{\"id\":\"master\",\"type\":\"Link\",\"linkType\":\"Environment\"}},\"publishedVersion\":13,\"revision\":1,\"contentType\":{\"sys\":{\"type\":\"Link\",\"linkType\":\"ContentType\",\"id\":\"titleBackgroundBlock\"}},\"locale\":\"en-US\"},\"fields\":{\"internalName\":\"Tri-City and Sharp partnership title block\",\"title\":\"Sharp HealthCare and Tri-City Healthcare District\",\"sectionLink\":\"tri-city-and-sharp-partnership-title-block\",\"titleHeading\":\"H1\",\"textAlignment\":\"left\",\"backgroundColor\":\"primary-50\",\"backgroundImage\":\"coastline\",\"overlap\":\"false\"}},{\"metadata\":{\"tags\":[],\"concepts\":[]},\"sys\":{\"space\":{\"sys\":{\"type\":\"Link\",\"linkType\":\"Space\",\"id\":\"pxcfulgsd9e2\"}},\"id\":\"1Shd4IqA1IZDqgxkz1geH6\",\"type\":\"Entry\",\"createdAt\":\"2025-08-21T23:15:07.484Z\",\"updatedAt\":\"2026-06-03T16:18:21.837Z\",\"environment\":{\"sys\":{\"id\":\"master\",\"type\":\"Link\",\"linkType\":\"Environment\"}},\"publishedVersion\":70,\"revision\":9,\"contentType\":{\"sys\":{\"type\":\"Link\",\"linkType\":\"ContentType\",\"id\":\"contentBlock\"}},\"locale\":\"en-US\"},\"fields\":{\"internalName\":\"Tri-City and Sharp HealthCare partnership content block\",\"sectionLink\":\"tri-city-and-sharp-healthcare-partnership-content-block\",\"content\":{\"nodeType\":\"document\",\"data\":{},\"content\":[{\"nodeType\":\"heading-2\",\"data\":{},\"content\":[{\"nodeType\":\"text\",\"value\":\"Advancing health care in San Diego \",\"marks\":[],\"data\":{}}]},{\"nodeType\":\"paragraph\",\"data\":{},\"content\":[{\"nodeType\":\"text\",\"value\":\"On June 2, 2026, voters in the Tri-City Healthcare District overwhelmingly approved Measure H, establishing a 30-year partnership between Tri-City Medical Center and Sharp HealthCare. \",\"marks\":[],\"data\":{}}]},{\"nodeType\":\"paragraph\",\"data\":{},\"content\":[{\"nodeType\":\"text\",\"value\":\"Pending certification of the election by the Registrar of Voters, Sharp will assume operations at the Oceanside hospital on July 1, 2026. The hospital will be renamed Sharp Tri-City Medical Center.\",\"marks\":[],\"data\":{}}]},{\"nodeType\":\"heading-3\",\"data\":{},\"content\":[{\"nodeType\":\"text\",\"value\":\"What’s coming next\",\"marks\":[],\"data\":{}}]},{\"nodeType\":\"paragraph\",\"data\":{},\"content\":[{\"nodeType\":\"text\",\"value\":\"This partnership will expand access to high-quality primary and specialty care, enhance the patient experience, and support long-term financial stability for both organizations.\",\"marks\":[],\"data\":{}}]},{\"nodeType\":\"paragraph\",\"data\":{},\"content\":[{\"nodeType\":\"text\",\"value\":\"At Tri-City, Sharp aims to strengthen medical services — restoring labor and delivery within the next several months and enhancing cancer care — while investing more than $100 million in infrastructure improvements and seismic upgrades.\",\"marks\":[],\"data\":{}}]},{\"nodeType\":\"heading-3\",\"data\":{},\"content\":[{\"nodeType\":\"text\",\"value\":\"What this means for your care\",\"marks\":[],\"data\":{}}]},{\"nodeType\":\"paragraph\",\"data\":{},\"content\":[{\"nodeType\":\"text\",\"value\":\"Tri-City patients can continue receiving care at the hospital before and after July 1. Patients will see their current providers, and care teams will remain in place during the transition.\",\"marks\":[],\"data\":{}}]},{\"nodeType\":\"paragraph\",\"data\":{},\"content\":[{\"nodeType\":\"text\",\"value\":\"Health insurance coverage for services at Tri-City will transition to Sharp on July 1, and preauthorized procedures will proceed as scheduled. \",\"marks\":[],\"data\":{}}]},{\"nodeType\":\"paragraph\",\"data\":{},\"content\":[{\"nodeType\":\"text\",\"value\":\"If you are a current Sharp patient, you may receive information from your medical group or doctor’s office about accessing care at Sharp Tri-City Medical Center. \",\"marks\":[],\"data\":{}}]},{\"nodeType\":\"paragraph\",\"data\":{},\"content\":[{\"nodeType\":\"text\",\"value\":\"In an emergency — when every minute counts — North County residents can continue to rely on timely care from a highly trained emergency team at the hospital.\",\"marks\":[],\"data\":{}}]},{\"nodeType\":\"heading-3\",\"data\":{},\"content\":[{\"nodeType\":\"text\",\"value\":\"What this means for employees and doctors at Tri-City\",\"marks\":[],\"data\":{}}]},{\"nodeType\":\"paragraph\",\"data\":{},\"content\":[{\"nodeType\":\"text\",\"value\":\"On July 1, Tri-City employees in good standing will transition to Sharp Tri‑City Medical Center and continue in their current roles with their current responsibilities.  ;(function (window, document, node, props, configs) {
 if (window.TalkdeskChatSDK) {
 console.error('TalkdeskChatSDK already included')
 return
 }
 var divContainer = document.createElement("div")
 divContainer.id = node
 document.body.appendChild(divContainer)
 var src = "https://talkdeskchatsdk.talkdeskapp.com/v2/talkdeskchatsdk.js"
 var script = document.createElement("script")
 var firstScriptTag = document.getElementsByTagName("script")[0]
 script.type = "text/javascript"
 script.charset = "UTF-8"
 script.id = "tdwebchatscript"
 script.src = src
 script.async = true
 firstScriptTag.parentNode.insertBefore(script, firstScriptTag)
 script.onload = function () {
 window.webchat = TalkdeskChatSDK(node, props)
 window.webchat.init(configs)
 document.addEventListener('keydown', (event) => {
 if (event.key === 'Escape' && typeof window.webchat?.close === 'function') {
 window.webchat.close()
 window.postMessage({ method: 'Minimize' })
 }
 })
 document
 .querySelectorAll("[data-chat='true']")
 .forEach((element) => {
 element.addEventListener("click", () => {
 window.webchat.open()
 const target = element.getAttribute("data-chat-target")
 if (target) {
 window.postMessage({ targetClick: target })
 }
 })
 })
 document
 .getElementById("tdWebchat")
 .addEventListener("click", (event) => {
 window.postMessage({ targetClick: "icon" })
 })
 }
 })(
 window,
 document,
 "tdWebchat",
